title: Chaosdrachen
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/juWHou8K82g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Chaosdrachen is a class-based RPG mod featuring 8 unique classes: Explosion Master,
  Portal Demon, Cyborg, Ice Age, Rabbit, Lord of The Burning Skies, Krystell, and
  Lich Zen. Each class has distinct passive abilities and 4 powerful active abilities
  that unlock through Minecraft advancements.

  Features:
  - Universal dash and double jump mechanics for all players
  - Custom enchantments to enhance your gameplay
  - Progression-based ability unlocking via advancements
  - Unique playstyles ranging from explosive combat to undead necromancy
